leadText: Not to be confused with Lost Item. The Dropped Item (Japanese: わすれもの Forgotten Item) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V. There are two variations of this item: a red one that belongs to Curtis, and a yellow one that belongs to Yancy.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Dropped Item is a Xtransceiver that belongs to Curtis (if the player is female ) or Yancy (if the player if male ). Upon picking it up, the owner will call their Xtransceiver and explain the situation to the player. After receiving ten calls from Curtis or Yancy, they will finally get enough time off from their work as an idol to retrieve their Xtransceiver in front of the Rondez-View Ferris Wheel in Nimbasa City , where the player can return their Xtransceiver, and register their number.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The Xtransceiver found at the Nimbasa City amusement park. It seems it belongs to a boy. * The Xtransceiver found at the Nimbasa City amusement park. It seems it belongs to a girl. *
